title: Remove accidental debug print statement
description: A debug print statement was accidentally left in the production order processing code, printing order details to stdout on every API call.
diff:
diff --git a/orders/processor.py b/orders/processor.py
index 2e3f4a5..b6c7d8e 100644
--- a/orders/processor.py
+++ b/orders/processor.py
@@ -22,7 +22,6 @@ def process_order(order: Order) -> OrderResult:
     validated = validate_order(order)
     if not validated.is_valid:
         return OrderResult(status="rejected", reason=validated.error)
-    print(f"DEBUG: processing order {order.id} amount={order.total_cents}")
 
     charge_result = charge_payment(order)
     if charge_result.failed:
comments: helen: Oops, leftover debug print. Approve.
author: ivan
